name: Khorasani Persian

ancestors.notes: New Persian; Khorasan is its cradle
Tajik adstrate: geographic continuum; Uzbek/Turkmen contact words

notes: Khorasani Persian (Xorāsānī). Northeastern Iran — the historical cradle of New Persian literature (Ferdowsi's Shahnameh). CONSERVATIVE: /a/ → [a] (not fronted to [æ] as in Tehran); ā → [aː] (not backed to [ɒː]); /q/ maintained more robustly than Tehran. Geographic bridge to Dari (Afghan Persian). Turkic (Uzbek, Turkmen) contact: /ŋ/ in loanwords.
